title: NBA Player Prop Predictor
description: Built an end-to-end AI-powered app predicting NBA player prop outcomes using XGBoost, trained on 27,000+ player-game rows. Engineered 20 contextual features and deployed on Streamlit with automated daily retraining via GitHub Actions.

title: Power Outage Duration Prediction
description: Analyzed 1,534 U.S. power outages with EDA, hypothesis testing, and missingness analysis. Built a scikit-learn Pipeline with Random Forest regression, reducing RMSE by 716 minutes over baseline.

title: Custom DataFrame Library in Java
description: Designed pandas-inspired DataFrame and Series classes for structured data manipulation. Built a generic Binary Search Tree and integrated a hash table for fast key-based access.

title: TKE Budget Automation Pipeline
description: Developed a Python automation pipeline using pandas to identify unpaid member balances and manage a $70,000 operating budget for Tau Kappa Epsilon at UC San Diego.

title: Financial Analytics Dashboard
description: Built interactive Excel dashboards at Prime CPAS LLC to track income, expenses, and anomalies. Standardized 500+ client records, reducing data processing time by 25%.
